description_long: This bungalow is a modern, spacious residential building surrounded by a wooden fence and featuring a large backyard with a tree and multiple outdoor living areas. The front facade has a clean, white exterior with symmetrical windows, a central entrance gate, and a driveway leading to a double garage. The backyard includes a pergola-covered patio, lounge chairs, and a secondary structure, possibly a shed or guest house. The roof is primarily flat with some gabled sections, and the property is landscaped with trees and shrubs. Large glass doors and windows provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The overall design emphasizes open, functional living with a blend of privacy and outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, white bungalow with a flat and gabled roof, large windows, a fenced yard, and multiple outdoor living spaces including a pergola and patio.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, symmetrical windows, double garage, and a fenced yard with minimal landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the driveway, garage, and a large tree in the backyard, with the pergola and patio area visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the expansive backyard, pergola-covered patio, lounge chairs, and a secondary structure near the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the backyard tree, secondary structure, and the open layout of the rear and side yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with large glass doors and grouped side windows
